hero.desc1: Lecturer of Personal Status Law at Knowledge University.
hero.desc2: Founder of Judi TV — Kurdistan's first Qur'an-dedicated channel.
hero.desc3: Active in media and social reform since 2000.
hero.badge_text: Comparative Islamic Jurisprudence · Media & Journalism · Social Reform

about.bio1: is a journalist, university lecturer, and humanitarian leader based in Kurdistan, Iraq. Holding a PhD in Sharia and Law with specialization in Comparative Islamic Jurisprudence, he lectures Personal Status Law at Knowledge University's College of Law.
about.bio2: Across more than two decades, he has shaped media, academia, and governance — founding Kurdistan's first Qur'an-dedicated TV channel, leading humanitarian foundations, and serving in senior roles within the Kurdistan Regional Government.
about.pillar1_desc: PhD · Comparative Islamic Jurisprudence · Lecturer of Personal Status Law at Knowledge University
about.pillar2_desc: Founder of Judi TV · U2 Channel · Speda Drama · Kurdistan's first Qur'an-dedicated television channel
about.pillar3_desc: Director · KRG Ministry of Labor & Social Affairs · Active in governance and social reform since 2006
about.pillar4_desc: President · Elia Foundation for Orphans · VP · Sahaba Organization · International memberships
about.quote: Dedicated to advancing knowledge, upholding justice, and serving the people of Kurdistan through scholarship, media, and humanitarian work.
about.stats_footer: Active in media, law, and humanitarian work across Kurdistan and beyond since 2000.
about.location: Based in Erbil, Kurdistan Region — Iraq

timeline.qual_1_desc: Specialization in Comparative Islamic Jurisprudence (Fiqh al-Muqaran), with research focusing on the intersection of Islamic legal traditions and modern law.
timeline.qual_2_desc: Advanced graduate studies in Islamic jurisprudence and legal systems at one of Sudan's most prestigious Islamic universities.
timeline.qual_3_desc: Comprehensive study of political science, governance, and public policy, complementing his legal expertise.
timeline.exp_1_inst: Office of the Minister of Labor & Social Affairs, Kurdistan Regional Government
timeline.exp_1_desc: Leading the monitoring and follow-up division, ensuring policy implementation and administrative accountability.
timeline.exp_2_inst: Ministry of Labor & Social Affairs, Kurdistan Regional Government
timeline.exp_2_desc: Managed the day-to-day operations and strategic affairs of the ministerial office during a critical period.
timeline.exp_3_inst: Directorate of Social Reform, Ministry of Labor & Social Affairs, Erbil
timeline.exp_3_desc: Long-standing educational role combining teaching with social reform and youth development.

institutional.description: Driving positive change through leadership in humanitarian and academic institutions across Kurdistan.
institutional.org1_desc: Leading humanitarian efforts and community development initiatives in Kurdistan and beyond.
institutional.org2_desc: For Qur'anic Research and Studies — advancing scholarly understanding and academic excellence in Islamic sciences.
institutional.org3_desc: Contributing to humanitarian aid and social welfare programs across the region.

media.description: Over 25 years of pioneering media work — political, intellectual, social, and field journalism since 2000.
media.judi_desc: The first television channel dedicated to the Holy Qur'an in Kurdistan and Iraq. A pioneering media initiative bringing Qur'anic content to millions.
media.judi_highlight: First of its kind in Kurdistan & Iraq
media.u2_desc: A dedicated channel for Islamic advocacy and education, providing valuable religious programming to audiences across the region.
media.speda_desc: A drama-focused channel delivering engaging storytelling and cultural content to Kurdish-speaking audiences.
media.dialogue_desc: An Islamic intellectual and jurisprudential program exploring critical topics in Islamic thought, comparative jurisprudence, and contemporary issues facing Muslim communities.

memberships.description: Recognized across national and global professional bodies in journalism, academia, and Islamic scholarship.

footer.name: Dr. Hogr Ghareeb Khidr
footer.bio: Journalist, scholar, and humanitarian leader. Shaping discourse in media, law, and public service since 2000.
